headline: FactSet Deepens AI Focus With New Crime Tools And Leadership Shift
summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) has added AI driven financial crime risk management tools to its Workstation platform, working with ComplyAdvantage to support banks and other financial institutions. The company has also named Kate Stepp as Chief AI Officer and Bob Stolte as Chief Technology Officer, signaling a sharper focus on AI within its leadership team. FactSet, trading at $225.87, is reshaping its product mix around AI driven workflows at a time when many clients are under...
